title: stellularia media var. neglecta
intro: Stellularia media var. neglecta, also known as Firecracker Plant, is a flowering succulent plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. The Firecracker Plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
